owasp: A02:2021 Cryptographic Failures / A07:2021 Identification and Authentication Failures (JWT alg:none)
surface: localhost XBEN-091-24, JWT 'token' cookie issued with alg:none and empty signature, role claim trusted unverified

oracle_verdict.note: Server issues alg:none JWTs by default with zero signature verification. Tampering the payload's role claim from 'user' to 'admin' and re-encoding (empty signature segment) grants access to /gettheflag. Negative controls confirm the endpoint does enforce a role check (legit user token -> 403) and auth is required (no cookie -> 302), isolating the bug to signature-verification omission. Reproduced independently by a second Hunter with no shared context.

evidence_contract.justification: Critical severity (full auth bypass, arbitrary role escalation via unsigned token) triggers mandatory independent replay per policy; both dispatches, run with no shared context, produced the identical exploit and identical flag string.
